condition.qualitative_description: SPI below -1.0 (moderate to severe meteorological drought) combined with MAI below 0.5 (soil moisture inadequacy) or VCI below 0.35 (significant vegetation stress) confirms co-occurring meteorological and agricultural drought.

Latest kharif seasonal rainfall is below 75% of the long-term mean annual precipitation, and the multi-year annual precipitation trend is declining, confirming a structural rainfall deficit rather than a single anomalous year.
Fewer than 5 cumulative soil and water conservation or irrigation works recorded under MGNREGA in the MWS, indicating historically low investment in water harvesting infrastructure.
Fewer than 5 cumulative soil and water conservation or irrigation works recorded under MGNREGA for the MWS, indicating historically low investment in water harvesting infrastructure.
Total urbanized area has expanded by more than 50 ha over the observation period, suggesting settlement encroachment into forest margins.

Fewer than 5 cumulative MGNREGA soil and water conservation works recorded in the micro-watershed, indicating insufficient wage employment provision and low investment in productive assets during lean seasons.

Fewer than 5 cumulative MGNREGA soil and water conservation works in the micro-watershed, indicating insufficient public employment and watershed investment to buffer households against agricultural income shocks.

Village is more than 30 km from the nearest APMC and more than 20 km from the nearest dairy collection centre, indicating that small holders face high transaction costs and are unable to diversify into livestock income.

Farmers report moderate-to-high borewell/tubewell density (roughly 10–50 or more than 50 within 2–3 km) in alluvium aquifers, indicating localised over-extraction not captured by block-level SOGE. Very low density or widespread borewell failure may indicate aquifer limits rather than density-driven stress.

missing_variable_questions.question_to_user: Approximately how many borewells or tubewells are there in your village or the surrounding 2–3 km area? Would you say very few (fewer than 10), a moderate number (10–30), or a large number (more than 30)?
missing_variable_questions.how_answer_updates_diagnosis: High borewell density (>30 in a small area) in a crystalline basement aquifer with spatially limited fracture zones confirms localised over-extraction that block-level SOGE cannot capture. This would elevate diagnosis confidence to high even if block-level SOGE appears Safe, because multiple borewells competing for the same fracture network can rapidly deplete local storage.

condition.expression: (drought_mild_spi_score_latest >= 26 or drought_severe_moderate_spi_score_latest >= 26) or drought_mild_vci_score_latest >= 26 or drought_mild_mai_score_latest >= 26
condition.qualitative_description: SPI class indicates moderate to extreme meteorological drought, or VCI below 35 signals significant vegetation stress, or MAI below 0.5 indicates soil moisture inadequacy — any one of these confirms agricultural drought per the India Drought Manual classification.

Kharif seasonal rainfall below 75% of the long-term annual mean, or mean annual precipitation below 700 mm, or a declining trend exceeding 5 mm/year confirms structural precipitation deficit underpinning drought risk.

SPI at or below -1.0 (moderate to severe meteorological drought) combined with VCI below 40 (moderate vegetation stress) confirms co-occurrence of meteorological and agricultural drought in the same kharif season.

SPI at or below -1.0 (moderate meteorological drought), MAI below 0.5 (soil moisture inadequacy), and VCI below 35 (significant vegetation stress) together confirm concurrent meteorological and agricultural drought per India Drought Manual classification.

condition.expression: mean_annual_precipitation_mm < 400 and seasonal_precipitation_mm[-1].get('kharif', 9999) < (0.75 * (sum(v.get('kharif', 0) for v in list(seasonal_precipitation_mm.values())[:-1]) / max(len(seasonal_precipitation_mm) - 1, 1)))
condition.qualitative_description: Mean annual precipitation below 400 mm (AER-2 threshold) and current kharif seasonal rainfall more than 25% below the multi-year kharif mean confirm a below-normal monsoon year in an already water-scarce baseline.

SPI below -1.0 (moderate to severe meteorological drought) co-occurring with MAI below 0.75 (soil moisture inadequacy) or VCI below 40 (vegetation stress) confirms both meteorological and agricultural drought are active simultaneously.

SPI at or below -1.0 (moderate to severe meteorological drought) combined with MAI below 0.5 (soil moisture inadequacy) or VCI below 0.35 (significant vegetation stress) confirms co-occurring meteorological and agricultural drought.

SPI at or below -1.0 (moderate to severe meteorological drought) combined with MAI below 0.5 (soil moisture inadequacy) or VCI below 40 (vegetation stress) confirms co-occurring meteorological and agricultural drought per India Drought Manual classification.

condition.expression: (drought_mild_spi_score_latest >= 26 or drought_severe_moderate_spi_score_latest >= 26) and (drought_mild_mai_score_latest >= 26 or drought_severe_moderate_path_score_latest >= 2) and drought_mild_vci_score_latest >= 26
condition.qualitative_description: Concurrent meteorological drought (SPI moderate or worse), inadequate soil moisture (MAI inadequate or highly inadequate), and vegetation stress (VCI below 35) together confirm agricultural drought affecting crop production.

Kharif seasonal rainfall below 75% of the long-term annual mean, or a declining multi-year precipitation trend below 900 mm/year, confirms meteorological drought as the primary driver of water scarcity.
SPI classification of moderate or worse drought combined with VCI below 35 confirms both meteorological and agricultural drought are co-occurring, ruling out irrigation-buffered scenarios.

condition.expression: drought_causality is not None and (drought_mild_spi_score_latest >= 26 or drought_severe_moderate_spi_score_latest >= 26) and drought_mild_vci_score_latest >= 26
condition.qualitative_description: SPI classification of moderate drought or worse, combined with VCI below 35 (indicating significant vegetation stress), jointly confirm both meteorological and agricultural drought are active.

condition.expression: (drought_mild_spi_score_latest >= 26 or drought_severe_moderate_spi_score_latest >= 26) and (drought_mild_mai_score_latest >= 26 or drought_severe_moderate_path_score_latest >= 2) and drought_mild_vci_score_latest >= 26
condition.qualitative_description: Concurrent meteorological drought (SPI), soil moisture inadequacy (MAI), and vegetation stress (VCI < 35) confirm agricultural drought as per India Drought Manual classification.

SPI below -1.0 (moderate meteorological drought), MAI below 0.5 (soil moisture inadequacy), or VCI below 40 (moderate vegetation stress) in kharif season confirms drought causality per India Drought Manual classification.

condition.expression: (drought_mild_spi_score_latest >= 26 or drought_severe_moderate_spi_score_latest >= 26) and (drought_mild_mai_score_latest >= 26 or drought_severe_moderate_path_score_latest >= 2) and drought_mild_vci_score_latest >= 26
condition.qualitative_description: Concurrent SPI indicating dry conditions, low MAI indicating soil moisture deficit, and VCI below 40 indicating vegetation stress together confirm meteorological drought has translated into agricultural drought.

SPI classification indicates at least moderate meteorological drought AND VCI below 35 confirms concurrent vegetation stress, together satisfying the India Drought Manual composite criterion for agricultural drought declaration.
SPI below -1.0 (moderate meteorological drought), MAI below 0.5 (soil moisture inadequacy), or VCI below 35 (significant vegetation stress) in kharif season confirms drought causality.
SPI classification of moderate drought or worse combined with VCI below 35 confirms co-occurrence of meteorological and agricultural drought, ruling out irrigation-buffered scenarios.

condition.expression: (drought_mild_spi_score_latest >= 26 or drought_severe_moderate_spi_score_latest >= 26) or drought_mild_vci_score_latest >= 26 or drought_mild_mai_score_latest >= 26
condition.qualitative_description: SPI indicating moderately dry or worse, VCI below 35, or MAI below 0.5 together confirm meteorological and agricultural drought co-occurrence per the India Drought Manual classification.
